svg.title: 8-agent startup idea analysis pipeline
svg.desc: Sequential pipeline: Signal Filter, Pain Extractor, Market Researcher, Opportunity Scorer, Feasibility Analyst, Go/No-Go Judge, PRD Generator (conditional), Opportunity Brief
svg.text: Raw signal in (scraped text from Reddit, HN, G2…)
每个 agent 收到原始信号 + 所有上游 agent 的输出
A6 输出决定 A7 是否执行 · A8 永远执行
